data.current_description: Synchronous endpoint to solve a vehicle routing problem. Returns optimized routes. Times out after 20 seconds.
data.description_suggestion: Synchronously solves a vehicle routing problem and returns optimized routes. Accepts a VrpRequest containing vehicles, visits, and routing options. Returns a RoutingSolution with optimized routes for each vehicle. Request times out after 20 seconds if optimization is not completed. Best for problems with fewer than 500 visits; use /v1/vrp-long for larger problems.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity on expected inputs (VrpRequest structure), specific output format (RoutingSolution), and guidance on when to use this endpoint versus the long-running variant. Added input/output schema references and scalability context for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'solvevrplongrunning' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_context. Missing details about response format (JobCreatedResponse), polling mechanism, and when to use this versus synchronous endpoint. Added schema references and clear guidance on the asynchronous workflow for AI agents.

data.current_description: Submit a vehicle routing problem as a long-running task. Returns a job ID to poll for results. Supports up to 2,500 visits.
data.description_suggestion: Asynchronously solves a vehicle routing problem as a long-running task. Accepts a VrpRequest containing vehicles, visits, and routing options. Returns a JobCreatedResponse with a job ID (202 Accepted). Poll the /jobs/{jobId} endpoint to retrieve the RoutingSolution once processing completes. Supports problems with up to 2,500 visits. Use this endpoint for complex routing problems that may exceed the 20-second timeout of the synchronous /v1/vrp endpoint.
data.reasoning: Missing details about response format (JobCreatedResponse), polling mechanism, and when to use this versus synchronous endpoint. Added schema references and clear guidance on the asynchronous workflow for AI agents.

message: Operation 'solvepdp' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description is incomplete - missing information about expected inputs, output format, and domain-specific constraints (pickup-before-delivery sequencing). data.current_description: Synchronous endpoint to solve a pickup and delivery routing problem. Times out after 20 seconds.
data.description_suggestion: Synchronously solves a pickup and delivery routing problem and returns optimized routes. Accepts a VrpRequest with pickup and delivery visit pairs and vehicle constraints. Returns a RoutingSolution with optimized routes respecting pickup-before-delivery sequencing. Request times out after 20 seconds if optimization is not completed. Best for problems with fewer than 500 visits; use /v1/pdp-long for larger problems.
data.reasoning: Description is incomplete - missing information about expected inputs, output format, and domain-specific constraints (pickup-before-delivery sequencing). Added schema context and scalability guidance for AI agent interpretability.

data.current_description: Submit a pickup and delivery problem as a long-running task. Returns a job ID to poll for results.
data.description_suggestion: Asynchronously solves a pickup and delivery routing problem as a long-running task. Accepts a VrpRequest with pickup and delivery visit pairs and vehicle constraints. Returns a JobCreatedResponse with a job ID (202 Accepted). Poll the /jobs/{jobId} endpoint to retrieve the RoutingSolution once processing completes. Use this endpoint for complex pickup-delivery problems that may exceed the 20-second timeout of the synchronous /v1/pdp endpoint.
data.reasoning: Missing response format details (JobCreatedResponse), polling instructions, and context about when to use this endpoint. Added schema references and clear asynchronous workflow guidance for AI agents.

message: Operation 'getjobstatus' has semantic quality issues: missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing critical details about the required jobId parameter, possible status values, and response structure. Added information about parameter source, status states, and result availability for better AI agent workflow understanding.

data.current_description: Poll for the status and results of a long-running routing task.
data.description_suggestion: Retrieves the status and results of a long-running routing task. Requires the jobId path parameter returned from /v1/vrp-long or /v1/pdp-long endpoints. Returns a JobStatusResponse containing the job status (pending, completed, or failed), and the RoutingSolution if completed. Poll this endpoint periodically until the job completes. Completed jobs remain available for retrieval.
data.reasoning: Missing critical details about the required jobId parameter, possible status values, and response structure. Added information about parameter source, status states, and result availability for better AI agent workflow understanding.
